content: Confirmed portfolio anti-patterns: percentage skill bars ('JavaScript 85%') read as amateur theater; tech-logo walls say less than one system explained well; stock photography; listing every language/framework ever touched; slow load (3s+) is an anti-signal, not neutral. AI chatbots are explicitly high-risk: a wrong answer about the candidate's own experience damages trust faster than a typo -- use with extreme caution or avoid. Alternative: show real systems/outcomes with specific technologies per project instead of exhaustive lists.
